creator: lutz@tavari.de
text:
Installation of curl is broken on FreeBSD-8.4 systems (works on FreeBSD-9). During building of the package the man pages can't be found. Can be reproduced on a fresh install with current ports:

===>  Building package for curl-7.33.0_2
Creating package /usr/ports/ftp/curl/work/curl-7.33.0_2.tbz
Registering depends: ca_root_nss-3.15.3.1 libssh2-1.4.3_1,2.
Creating bzip'd tar ball in '/usr/ports/ftp/curl/work/curl-7.33.0_2.tbz'
